Appearances:
Plaintiff Yerba Buena Commons, is present. Represented by Mitchell Brown.
Attorney, Cindy Lee, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Marlon Posadas, is present.
Attorney, John Weinstein , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tom Maxwell, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-12-2010 is vacated.
